utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- setup_services: Present with package, cost, details — fully specified.
- total_budget: Present with breakdown (property_price, legal_services, survey, moving, utilities, grand_total) — fully specified.
Step 3: All 6 required items are present and include complete details as per requirements.
